title: Premier Housewares Arco Wall Clock - Yellow
features: Tell the time in style with our practical wall clock
Featuring a bright and colourful design that will hang elegantly in your kitchen or dining room
Care instructions: Wipe clean with a soft cloth
Height 30 cm x Width 30 cm x Depth 7 cm
description: Product Description Adding style, colour and practicality to your home, the Arco wall clock would make a wonderful feature in your kitchen. Made using high impact polystyrene, the curved square design will stand the test of time. The crisp white clock features vibrant yellow detail and black hands allowing you to clearly read the time, even at a glance. Perfect for the kitchen, the contemporary design will allow you to keep track of time so you dont burn your wonderful meal. Premier Housewares are one of the UKs leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. With an extensive portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and occasional furniture, aim is to provide a complete solution to your housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of co-ordinating products. Box Contains 1 x Premier Housewares Arco Wall Clock - Yellow
